privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataCollectedBody: CarAdvisor stores your preferences, session token, and favourites in your browser's localStorage. Chat messages are sent to Groq for AI processing. No personal identifiers are collected or required.
privacy.thirdPartiesBody: Chat messages are processed by Groq (United States). Vehicle listings originate from public sources (automobile.tn, AutoScout24).
privacy.retentionBody: Data stored in localStorage is retained until you clear it via the footer link or your browser settings. Chat sessions expire after 30 days.
privacy.rightsBody: If you are an EU resident you may request access, correction, or deletion of any data we hold. Contact us via the Imprint page.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.liabilityBody: We strive to keep information accurate but make no warranty for completeness or availability of vehicle listings sourced from third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.useBody: CarAdvisor is a free, anonymous vehicle-search tool. You agree not to abuse the service or attempt to extract data at scale.
terms.accuracyBody: Vehicle data is aggregated from public sources and may be outdated. Always verify details with the original seller before taking any action.
terms.liabilityBody: CarAdvisor is provided 'as is' without warranty. We are not a party to any transaction between you and a seller.
